texto: Faith is kind of like jumping out of an airplane at ten thousand feet. If God doesn't catch you you splatter. But how do you know whether or not He is going to catch you unless you jump out?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ann Kiemel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “Faith is kind of like jumping out of an airplane at ten thousand feet. If God doesn't catch you y…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, faith, unity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de unity.
